title: Server Administration and Player Kick Flow
interaction_flow: ServerControl → handler.register('kick'): finds Player by name
Administration → Administration: kickedIPs.put(ip, expiry); info.timesKicked++; info.lastKicked=expiry
NetConnection → Call: kick(con, KickReason.kick)  [sends packet to client]
ServerControl → Administration: banPlayerID(uuid) [sets PlayerInfo.banned=true, fires PlayerBanEvent]
ServerControl → Administration: banPlayerIP(ip) [adds to bannedIPs, fires PlayerIpBanEvent]
SNet → SNet: [listens PlayerIpBanEvent] updateBans(ip) → smat.setLobbyData('banned', steamBanList)
ServerControl → [each online player]: if isIDBanned → player.con.kick(KickReason.banned)
AdminClient → NetServer: adminRequest(player, other, AdminAction.ban, params)  [@Remote Loc.client→Loc.server]
NetServer → NetServer: check player.admin || player.isLocal() [deny if false]
AdminClient → NetServer: adminRequest(player, other, AdminAction.kick, params)
NetServer → NetServer: guard checks (enableVotekick, ≥3 players, no ongoing vote, cooldown)
NetServer → VoteSession: new VoteSession(found)  [starts Timer task for voteDuration=30s]
VoteSession → VoteSession: votes++; voted.put(uuid, sign); voted.put(lastIP, sign)
VoteSession → Call: sendMessage(score tally broadcast to all)
VoteSession → Call: sendMessage('Vote passed, banned for N minutes')
Timer → VoteSession: task callback → checkPass() fails
Client → NetServer: ConnectPacket (uuid, usid, name, version)
NetServer → Administration: getKickTime(uuid, ip) → max(info.lastKicked, kickedIPs[ip])
[on next connection from matching prefix] NetServer → Administration: isSubnetBanned(ip) → true
key_relationships: ServerControl implements ApplicationListener; holds CommandHandler handler
NetServer holds Administration admins; contains inner class VoteSession
NetServer.adminRequest() is @Remote(targets=Loc.client, called=Loc.server) — RPC from in-game admin client
Administration.handleKicked(uuid, ip, duration) persists ban expiry in kickedIPs map and PlayerInfo.lastKicked
SNet listens to PlayerIpBanEvent/PlayerIpUnbanEvent → updates Steam lobby 'banned' metadata
VoteSession is an inner class of NetServer; currentlyKicking field guards one active vote
key_data_structures: PlayerInfo fields: id, banned(bool), admin(bool), lastKicked(long), timesKicked(int), ips(Seq<String>), names(Seq<String>)
VoteSession fields: target(Player), voted(ObjectIntMap<String>), task(Timer.Task), votes(int)
important_notes: KickReason.kick and KickReason.banned both use 30s kick-duration in NetConnection.kick(KickReason); KickReason.vote uses kickDuration*1000 (1 hour)
NetConnection.kick() is idempotent: 'if(kicked) return' guard prevents double-kick
VoteSession uses both uuid and lastIP as vote keys to prevent duplicate voting from same origin
Admin votekick cancel: /vote c by admin → cancels task, sets currentlyKicking=null
Admin guard in adminRequest: checks player.admin || player.isLocal(); also blocks admin-on-admin actions
SNet (Steam) only updates ban list for steam: prefixed IPs; normal IP bans ignored for Steam lobby visibility
subnet-ban uses prefix matching: isSubnetBanned checks subnetBans.contains(ip::startsWith)
Name bans use case-insensitive regex patterns via Pattern.compile(regex, CASE_INSENSITIVE)
forceSave() writes: player-data, ip-kicks, ip-bans, whitelist-ids, banned-subnets, banned-names to Core.settings (JSON)
